heading: Acquisition workforce
label: 3006 Acquisition workforce
text: For the definition of the term “acquisition workforce” for the purposes of this part, see .section 101(a)(18) of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3010 was renumbered .section 7011 of this title
